meta.title: Croatia vs Brazil — Quarter-finals
meta.trigger_label: Second half — Croatia locked at 1-1, a moment of brilliance needed

context: A tense moment in this quarter-finals match. Croatia and Brazil are locked at 1-1. One tactical shift could be the difference between glory and heartbreak.

away_players.name: Vinícius José Paixão de Oliveira Júnior

real_decision.description: The match went to penalties after a 1-1 draw. Neymar da Silva Santos Junior (105'), Bruno Petković (116').

pre_generated_explanations.A:
**OPTION A — Make an attacking substitution to break the deadlock**
Risk level: High. This is the positive choice. An attacking substitution signals intent and can break the deadlock. In the context of this quarter-finals match between Croatia and Brazil (1-1), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
pre_generated_explanations.B:
**OPTION B — Push the full-backs higher, create overloads out wide**
Risk level: Medium. This is the width-based approach. Overlapping full-backs create numerical advantages in wide areas. In the context of this quarter-finals match between Croatia and Brazil (1-1), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
pre_generated_explanations.C:
**OPTION C — Stay patient, maintain shape, look for a moment of magic**
Risk level: Medium. This is the patient choice. Maintaining shape avoids risk but may not be enough to win. In the context of this quarter-finals match between Croatia and Brazil (1-1), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
pre_generated_explanations.D:
**OPTION D — Go ultra-attacking — bring on an extra striker**
Risk level: Very High. This is the all-out attacking option. An extra striker increases goal threat but sacrifices midfield control. In the context of this quarter-finals match between Croatia and Brazil (1-1), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
